auth.signInDescription: Sign in to your MateCrew account
auth.signUpDescription: Join MateCrew to track your maté consumption
auth.name: Name
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgotPasswordSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter a new password for your account.
auth.resetPasswordFailed: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.
auth.resetTokenInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.verifyEmailBanner: Please verify your email address to secure your account.
auth.verificationEmailSent: Verification email sent — check your inbox.

home.noOfficeDescription: You are not a member of any office yet.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.breakdownDescription: Breakdown of what you owe to each payer this month (estimate)
dashboard.noPaymentsInPeriod: No payments involving you in this period.
dashboard.noRequestsYet: No requests yet. Head to the Request page to get your first maté!
dashboard.takeCanConfirmDescription: This can will be charged directly to your account.
dashboard.cancelConsumptionDescription: The consumption will be reversed, the charge undone, and the can added back to stock. The audit trail will be preserved.
dashboard.consumptionCancelled: Consumption cancelled — stock and billing corrected

request.mateServedDescription: Your maté has been served. Enjoy!
request.mateRequestedDescription: Your request is registered. A runner will prepare your maté.
request.wantMateToday: Want a maté today? Click to order one!
request.onlyOneForNow: You're the only one so far!

runner.title: Today's Preparation
runner.ordersClosedDescription: Orders have been closed since {time}. The list is final.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Manage maté sessions for {office}.
schedule.label: Label
schedule.timeAlignmentNote: Times must be multiples of {step} min.
schedule.copyDescription: Copy sessions from one day to other days. Existing sessions on target days will be replaced.

cron.title: Cron Jobs
cron.subtitle: Scheduled tasks for {office}.
cron.taskCount: {count} cron {count, plural, one {job} other {jobs}} configured via Upstash QStash.

settings.title: Office Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage settings for {office}.
settings.generalDescription: Update your office configuration and Slack integration.
settings.name: Name
settings.deleteDescription: Permanently delete this office and all its data including memberships, requests, stock, purchases, invoices, consumption history, and reimbursements. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all associated data. This action is irreversible.

prediction.title: Reorder Forecast
prediction.subtitle: Estimated date stock will reach the reorder threshold.
prediction.notEnoughData: Not enough consumption data yet — check back after a few days of activity.
prediction.alreadyBelowThreshold: Stock is already at or below the reorder threshold.

purchases.title: Purchases
purchases.subtitle: Record maté purchases and manage invoices.
purchases.newPurchaseDescription: Record a purchase. Stock is updated when delivery is marked as received.

reimbursements.adminSubtitle: Monthly settlement periods, payment tracking, and export.
reimbursements.noPeriodsYet: No reimbursement periods yet. Click "Generate missing months" to backfill.
reimbursements.allMonthsUpToDate: All months are already up to date
reimbursements.deleteDescription: This will permanently remove the period and all its payment lines. This cannot be undone.
reimbursements.userSubtitle: Your payment history across all settlement periods.
reimbursements.estimatedBill: Estimated bill for the current month (not yet settled)
reimbursements.noPeriodsCreated: No reimbursement periods have been created yet.
reimbursements.consumptionHistoryDescription: All your maté consumptions. You can cancel mistakes.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Manage members and their roles.
members.addMemberDescription: Add an existing user by their email address.
members.name: Name
members.removeMemberDescription: Remove {name} from this office? They will lose access immediately.

joinRequest.title: Join {office}
joinRequest.description: You are not a member of this office. Send a request to join and an admin will review it.
joinRequest.pendingDescription: Your request to join {office} has been sent. An admin will review it shortly.
joinRequest.rejectedDescription: Your request to join {office} was declined. You can submit a new request.

office.createSubtitle: Set up a new office to manage maté for your team.
office.name: Office Name

errors.requestsClosed: Requests are closed after {time}. Too late!
errors.alreadyCancelled: This consumption has already been cancelled.
errors.slackFailed: Slack message failed. Check the bot token and channel ID.
errors.officeNameExists: An office with this name already exists.
errors.noActivityData: No consumption or purchase data found.
errors.notAuthorizedPayment: You are not authorized to mark this payment.
errors.paymentAlreadyPaid: Payment is already marked as paid.
errors.stockNotFound: Stock record not found for this office.
errors.startBeforeClose: Start time must be before close time.
errors.timeAlignment: {field} must be a multiple of {step} min.
errors.noSessionsToNotify: No sessions to notify (already sent or no sessions today).
errors.invalidFileType: Invalid file type: {name}. Allowed: PDF, PNG, JPG.
errors.atLeastOneRole: At least one role is required
errors.cannotRemoveLastAdmin: Cannot remove the last admin of this office
errors.userNotFound: No user found with this email address
errors.alreadyMember: This user is already a member of this office
errors.joinRequestAlreadyPending: You already have a pending request to join this office
errors.joinRequestAlreadyHandled: This join request has already been handled

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information.
profile.name: Name
profile.defaultOfficeDescription: The office you'll be redirected to after signing in.

bulkConsumption.title: Consumption
bulkConsumption.subtitle: Bulk-add maté consumption entries. Ideal for migrating data from another system.
bulkConsumption.formDescription: Add consumption entries for any member. Entries will appear as unpaid in the current billing period.
bulkConsumption.noRows: Add at least one row with a member selected.
bulkConsumption.noRowsHint: Click "Add row" or "Fill all members" to start.
bulkConsumption.deductStockHint: Toggle the master switch to set all rows at once, or adjust per row in the table.

slack.mateOfTheDay:
<!here> :coffee: *Maté of the day — {office}*
:calendar: {date}

Who wants a maté today?
slack.sessionRequest:
<!here> :coffee: *Maté{label} — {office}*
:alarm_clock: Orders open until {cutoff}

Who wants a maté?
slack.testMessage:
*Test from MateCrew*
Slack integration for *{office}* is working!
slack.monthlyBill:
<!here> :receipt: *Monthly bill — {office}*
:calendar: {month}/{year}

:busts_in_silhouette: {consumers} consumers · :coffee: {totalQty} matés · :moneybag: {totalCost} CHF

Check your reimbursements in the app!
